absence.example: Her absence from class worried the teacher.
absence.example_zh: 她沒來上課讓老師很擔心。

absence.example: In the absence of water, the plants died.
absence.example_zh: 在缺水的情況下，植物枯死了。

absent.example: He had an absent look during the meeting.
absent.example_zh: 開會時他一臉心不在焉。

accept.example: She was happy to accept the invitation.
Most people accept that exercise is good for health.
accept.example_zh: 大多數人都認同運動有益健康。

accident.example: He was hurt in a car accident.
We met by accident at the station.

account.example: I opened a bank account last week.
account.example_zh: 我上週開了一個銀行帳戶。

account.example: He could not account for the missing money.
account.example_zh: 他無法解釋那筆遺失的錢。

account.example: She gave a clear account of the event.
account.example_zh: 她對這件事做了清楚的敘述。

active.example: She is active in many school clubs.
active.example_zh: 她積極參加許多學校社團。

activity.example_zh: 游泳是我最喜歡的活動。

actual.example: The actual cost was higher than we thought.
actual.example_zh: 實際花費比我們想的還高。

addition.example_zh: 孩子先學加法再學減法。

addition.example: In addition to math, he teaches science.
addition.example_zh: 除了數學，他還教自然科學。

address.example: Please write your address on the form.
address.example_zh: 請在表格上寫下你的地址。

address.example: We must address this problem now.
address.example_zh: 我們必須現在處理這個問題。

address.example: The president addressed the whole nation.
address.example_zh: 總統對全國人民發表演說。

admit.example: He admitted that he was wrong.
Only members are admitted to the club.
admit.example_zh: 只有會員才能進入這個俱樂部。

adult.example: Children must come with an adult.
This movie is for adult viewers.
adult.example_zh: 這部電影適合成年觀眾。

advance.example: Please book the tickets in advance.

advice.example: My teacher gave me good advice.
advice.example_zh: 老師給了我很好的建議。

affair.example: It is a family affair, not yours.
affair.example_zh: 這是家務事，不關你的事。

affair.example: The news reported the actor's affair.
affair.example_zh: 新聞報導了那位演員的緋聞。

affect.example: The cold weather affects my mood.
affect.example_zh: 寒冷的天氣影響我的心情。

affect.example: The sad story deeply affected her.
affect.example_zh: 這個悲傷的故事深深感動了她。

against.example_zh: 我們這隊和他們那隊比賽。

ahead.example: Go straight ahead and you'll see it.
ahead.example_zh: 直直往前走你就會看到。

ahead.example: She finished the work ahead of time.

aid.example: They sent aid to the flood victims.
aid.example_zh: 他們把援助送給水災災民。
良好的光線有助於閱讀。

aim.example: Her aim is to become a doctor.
He aimed the arrow at the target.

alarm.example: The fire alarm woke everyone up.
alarm.example_zh: 火災警報把大家吵醒了。

alarm.example: The loud noise alarmed the children.
alarm.example_zh: 巨大的聲響使孩子們驚慌。

album.example: The band released a new album.
album.example_zh: 這個樂團發行了一張新專輯。

album.example: She keeps her photos in an album.

alike.example: The twins look very much alike.
alike.example_zh: 這對雙胞胎長得非常像。
這條規則對每個人一視同仁。

alive.example: The street comes alive at night.
alive.example_zh: 這條街在晚上變得熱鬧起來。

altogether.example: Altogether, it cost two hundred dollars.
The two plans are altogether different.

among.example: She is the tallest among her friends.

amount.example: A large amount of water was wasted.
The bill amounts to one thousand dollars.

ancient.example_zh: 我們學了古埃及的歷史。

anger.example: He could not hide his anger.
anger.example_zh: 他無法掩飾自己的憤怒。

anger.example: His rude words angered the teacher.
anger.example_zh: 他無禮的話惹怒了老師。

angle.example: A square has four right angles.
Let's look at the problem from another angle.
angle.example_zh: 我們從另一個角度來看這個問題。

ankle.example: She hurt her ankle while running.

anyway.example: It was raining, but we went anyway.
anyway.example_zh: 雖然下著雨，我們還是去了。

anywhere-anyplace.example: I can't find my keys anywhere.

ape.example: An ape is similar to a monkey.

appearance.example: Don't judge people by their appearance.
The singer made a surprise appearance.

appetite.example: Exercise gives me a good appetite.

apply.example: She applied for a summer job.
apply.example_zh: 她申請了一份暑期工作。

apply.example: We can apply this rule to many cases.
apply.example_zh: 我們可以把這條規則運用到許多情況。

approach.example: We need a new approach to this problem.
approach.example_zh: 我們需要解決這個問題的新方法。

argue.example: They often argue about small things.
She argued that the plan would work.
argue.example_zh: 她主張這個計畫會成功。

arrange.example: I will arrange a meeting for tomorrow.
She arranged the flowers in a vase.
arrange.example_zh: 她把花插進花瓶裡擺好。

arrival.example: We waited for the arrival of the train.

arrow.example: He shot an arrow at the target.
Follow the arrow to the exit.

article.example: I read an interesting article today.
article.example_zh: 我今天讀了一篇有趣的文章。

article.example: Each article in the shop has a price tag.
article.example_zh: 店裡每件商品都有標價。

artist.example: The artist painted a beautiful picture.
artist.example_zh: 這位藝術家畫了一幅美麗的畫。

attempt.example: She made an attempt to climb the wall.
He attempted to fix the bike himself.

attend.example: All students must attend the meeting.
attend.example_zh: 所有學生都必須出席會議。

attention.example: Please pay attention to the teacher.

author.example: She is the author of many books.

available.example: Tickets are available at the door.
The doctor is not available now.

average.example: He is just an average student.
average.example_zh: 他只是個成績普通的學生。

avoid.example: Try to avoid sugar to stay healthy.

backpack.example: He carried his books in a backpack.
